boat.owned: Garry Scott Draco Bass Boat / Lupus Motor Boat
boat.use: Recommended for covering the river - trout mission completed via boat trolling

loadout_progress.improvement_summary: First Tiber trip 4/12. Used Saint-Croix-style loadout adapted for smaller Euro species. Active lures on Salmonster (Barbless Nano Spinner, Narrow Spoon, Spinner 1/8 Oz) worked well. Bottom rods downsized to #4-#6 hooks.

overall_analysis.density_warning: Tiber has LOW FISH DENSITY compared to Saint-Croix. Expect 1 hit per 4-10 casts on active lures and long waits between bottom rod hits. 17 in-game hours yielded only 21k credits - approximately 1/3 of Saint-Croix income rate.
overall_analysis.travel_cost_note: Travel is ~7,500 credits. At Tiber's density, you need 30+k in fish to break even after supplies. MISSION COMPLETION IS THE ONLY REASON TO VISIT.
mvp_active_lures: Barbless Nano Spinner 1/8 Oz #1/0 - produced Unique European Chub, Unique European Perch, multiple trophies
Spinner 1/8 Oz #1/0 - Trophy European Chub 4.28 lb in evening window
Narrow Spoon 3/4 Oz #3/0 - Trophy European Brown Trout 3.83 lb via drop-and-pause technique
mvp_baits: Medium Cutbait (night) - Unique European Eel 7.088 lb on Tribal Totem bottom
Semolina Balls - Trophy Common Barbel 4.18 lb
Pinkies - panfish completion (crucian, perch, roach) on Troy 23' telescopic
Leeches - perch and wels catfish bycatch
Night Crawlers - Trophy Common Carp 9.56 lb
Bread with Honey - Young Common Carp, European Bitterling
technique_notes: Drop-and-pause technique (same cadence as Saint-Croix) works on trout - completed Tiber Trout I mission via boat trolling
Reel speed Med-Fast (not Full) preserves rod/reel wear on larger fish
Small spinners (1/8 Oz #1/0) outperform larger lures for Euro river predators
unique_catches_session_1: Unique European Eel 7.088 lb (Medium Cutbait, night)
Unique European Perch 3.007 lb (Barbless Nano Spinner)
Unique European Chub 4.034 lb (Barbless Nano Spinner)
overall_analysis.user_verdict: LOW PRIORITY RETURN. User explicitly disliked this location - sparse fish density + high travel cost = poor $/hour. Finish Exploration II (2 fish remaining) then leave. Not a destination for income farming.

completed: Tiber Trout Mission I (4/12) - completed via boat + drop-and-pause
